events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the staged data/comm & security materials (cable, connectors, hardware) match the size, category, and rating on the reference sheet, are clean/intact, and show no non-compliance, the decision is **pass** with **low risk** — the kit is ready to proceed to rough-in, contingent on verifying cable listing for the space and power separation during the pull per NEC 800 and TIA-568.
